name: ADCS Certificate Template Configuration Vulnerability
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Orlinum , BlueDefenZer
SIGMA Title: ADCS Certificate Template Configuration Vulnerability
SIGMA Description: Detects certificate creation with template allowing risk permission subject

False positives:
- Administrator activity
- Proxy SSL certificate with subject modification
- Smart card enrollement

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (("Event ID"=4898 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ct_flag_enrollee_supplies_subject%') OR ("Event ID"=4899 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ct_flag_enrollee_supplies_subject%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY ADCS Certificate Template Configuration Vulnerability on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (("Event ID"=4898 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ct_flag_enrollee_supplies_subject%') OR ("Event ID"=4899 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ct_flag_enrollee_supplies_subject%')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: ADCS Certificate Template Configuration Vulnerability
